headline: $10+ Bn Microbiology Testing Market Analysis by Product, Technology, End User - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The global microbiology testing market is set to reach USD 10.09 billion by 2031, growing from USD 7.79 billion in 2026 at a CAGR of 5.3%. Growth is driven by rising contamination risks in food, water, and environmental sectors, along with advances in testing technologies. Pharmaceutical & biotech companies dominate the market due to stringent regulations for contamination control and product safety.
